calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2024 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Fardin Amir aka Fardin Amirir an individual and dba as Eyebrows Plus.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:30:00 a.m., and concluding at 9:58:03 a.m. (D505)

John P. Byrne, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center, L.P.
Defendant Fardin Amir aka Fardin Amirir an individual and dba as Eyebrows Plus not appearing.
Darren Iverson sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Plaintiff to summarize and to offer proof to prayer in the complaint.
Witness Darren Iverson is called to testify.
Court examines witness.
Witness testifies and confirms that declarations made and counsel's statements are true and correct.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant:

Damages $357,366.57
Interest $0
Costs $619.00
Attorney's Fees $0

Total Judgment $357,985.57

Proposed judgment signed and executed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2024 Continued To Sep-18-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
